assertions.title: Browser-only preset yields browser-attributed outcomes only

steps.observed: Terminal reached after ~42 seconds with status: partial

steps.expected: sources array contains only sourceId: grounded_web
steps.observed: sources array contains grounded_web, greenhouse, ashby - FAIL

steps.action: Verify grounded_web has skip/exclusion warnings for ATS lanes
steps.observed: Warnings correctly show: 'Source greenhouse was excluded by preset browser_only' and 'Source ashby was excluded by preset browser_only'

assertions.issues: STRICT FAIL: sources array includes ATS sources (greenhouse, ashby) even though they are correctly excluded via warnings. Per cross-area-flows.test.ts lines 430-437, the test asserts 'browser_only sources must only contain grounded_web' and explicitly checks 'browser_only must not have ATS sources in terminal status'. The actual terminal status includes greenhouse and ashby entries with exclusion warnings, violating the strict contract.

frictions.description: browser_only preset correctly identifies ATS exclusion in warnings but still includes ATS source entries in sources array
frictions.resolution: N/A - code behavior vs contract mismatch

summary: Tested VAL-CROSS-001: browser_only preset correctly emits exclusion warnings for ATS lanes (greenhouse, ashby), but the sources array still contains entries for these excluded ATS sources. Per the strict test contract (cross-area-flows.test.ts), sources must contain ONLY grounded_web with no ATS source entries. This is a FAIL against the strict contract.
